---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Upload / click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen instead.

## Screenshots / logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant logs (redact any API keys!).

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- How you're running it: [Docker compose / backend+frontend individually]
- LLM provider: [nvidia / anthropic / openai / gemini / ollama]
- Embedding provider: [nvidia / local / openai]
- Browser (if a UI bug): [e.g. Chrome 120]

## Additional context
Anything else that might help us diagnose the issue.
